projects.title: SolanaSnipe Bot
projects.description: Real-time Solana whale tracking dashboard. Monitors big transactions, whale wallet activity, new token listings, and large trades — with AI-generated summaries powered by Claude.

projects.title: Mayfair Hotels Wuse 2
projects.description: Proposed website for a boutique hotel in Abuja, Nigeria. Full booking UI, room showcase, amenities, gallery, and guest reviews — designed to convert visitors into reservations.

projects.title: Silverwrit Attorneys
projects.description: Full website for a foremost corporate & commercial law firm operating across Abuja and Lagos. Features practice areas, team profiles, and consultation booking.

projects.title: CSW Nigeria
projects.description: Full NGO website for Christian Solidarity Worldwide Nigeria — a human rights advocacy organisation focused on religious freedom. Built to support their mission and outreach.
